svg.title: Repo Visualizer — preview of the four visual themes
svg.desc: Four small mockups showing how the Galaxy, Organic, Neural and Minimal themes render a snapshot of a codebase: clustered nodes connected by import edges with ripple animations around recently-touched files.
svg.text: Four visual themes — switch live with 1 / 2 / 3 / 4
Each commit ripples around the files it touched · top-level directories are clusters · imports are edges
